title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Saturn, Vegapunk, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Jinbe as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Marine Head- quarters

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The straw hat pirates are within egghead island ya say?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Good grief... the situation is getting more and more complicated!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does this mean, vegapunk noticed that Cipher Pol is targeting him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh? Then does that mean they forced their entry?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going to declare war, ya could've consulted with me first, ya damn brats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If vegapunk will ally himself with straw hat...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It will leave a crack on our enormous military strength!

dialogue.speaker: Saturn
dialogue.text: Where's Kizaru?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He heard the strategy beforehand and is now headed towards egghead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure to tell Lucci that he should wait for the Marines' arrival!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must not fight against straw hat at all cost!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: In the new world - Egghead

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now wait just a damn minute, Lucci!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Luffy! Know your stance here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This will become a major incident!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What is that?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Was that how Rob Lucci looked before?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now this is a rare sight, look at their speed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are many cases that the awakening of the 20an types robs their users of their own personality.....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat... don't think you're the only one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Leopard awakening form

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who's gotten stronger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop it Lucci! We haven't got permission yet!

dialogue.speaker: Lilith
dialogue.text: Shaka! Has he appeared?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The White Warrior?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah! The real vegapunk was just below a while ago!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell me! What is this Trans- formation of straw hat called?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We don't really quite know it ourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it a power of the gomu-gomu no mi?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
